'''''Heir to the Empire'' 3''' was the third issue in the [[Star Wars: Heir to the Empire (comic series)|''Star Wars: Heir to the Empire'' comic adaptation]] series of comics based on the novel ''[[Heir to the Empire]]''. It was released [[December 12]], [[1995]].

==Publisher's summary==
''When an Imperial assassin puts Leia in his cross-hairs, Chewbacca crosses the galaxy to take Leia to a place of safety. But there are things in the galaxy that are worse than being assassinated, and "safety" is only relative.''
